response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical depth and has built developer tools and testing infrastructure, he lacks the core requirement for this role: formal people management experience. The position explicitly requires 2 years in people management or team leadership; his resume shows only individual contributions and occasional mentoring through workshops, with no evidence of direct reports, team leadership, or performance management responsibilities. Additionally, his developer-tools experience appears limited to 1-2 years (NI LabWindows, MCP work, testing libraries) versus the 3 years required. He is a strong technical leader and architect, but fundamentally unqualified for a mid-to-senior management role focused on people leadership.
strengths: Deep technical expertise across multiple languages and domains with 19 years of development experience
Proven ability to design and build developer tools, testing frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), and infrastructure systems
Strong track record mentoring and teaching through workshops, code katas, and open-source contributions
concerns: No formal people management experience despite role requiring 2+ years in team leadership or direct-report management
Limited developer-tools focus—background is primarily full-stack development and DevOps infrastructure rather than 3 years of dedicated tools/build systems
No evidence of driving organizational change, managing performance expectations, or conducting one-on-ones with direct reports

key_factors.factor: Technical architecture and hands-on coding capability
